post: The OB53 Update titled "Undersea Mystery" was released on April 8, 2026, bringing an ocean-themed experience to Free Fire. The update introduces a new map area called the "Undersea Realm" accessible via a vortex at Nurek Dam on the Bermuda map, where players can explore underwater environments, fish for buff-granting companions, and collect special Bubble Airdrops dropped by giant whales. A new water-based weapon, the Hydro Blaster, has been added along with a new character named Ray, whose active skill "Sunpower" allows him to tag enemies and instantly knock them down when they reach low health.
